display_text: Seeds of Serenity, Tier 5: Deploys a verdant area for 8 seconds that provides health regeneration to all allies inside. The base healing is 6 HP/sec plus 25% of the caster's health regeneration at the time of casting. Acts as a powerful, team-oriented healing zone. Stats: Cooldown: 35s, Duration: 8s, Radius: 400.
